Romanization

Snow falls on my shoes tonight,
Christmas lights are shining bright,
Voices ring from every side,
The city shines in white.

Sweet songs drift from every door,
Hands with cakes and joy once more,
Lanterns glow on snowy ground,
Bells are ringing through the town.

The season slows, as lights all glow,
The world feels wrapped in snow.
Christmas time is near.

Let’s sing together, side by side,
Let’s feel the joy, this Christmas night.
Make a wish,
Tomorrow’s light will shine for you.

Let’s dance together, in the white,
On this endless Christmas night.
Make a wish,
All your dreams come true,
That’s Christmas tonight.

Carols hum where cold winds meet,
People smile on crowded streets,
Windows show a world so near,
I wish this night lasted forever.

Cups of warmth and songs we share,
Every voice feels kind and fair,
Today, may all you hope for come,
